citation.description: _gc_config_unit sets maintenance.autoDetach=false + gc.autoDetach=false (foreground maintenance) to close the background repack race that caused the tree-build/HEAD errors. Test test_concurrent_writer_storm_no_loss is active (no skip) and asserts no writer failures.

criteria.criterion: test_concurrent_writer_storm_no_loss no longer fails under CI-load parallelism (the git tree-build/HEAD race is closed — e.g. ensure blobs are durably written before tree-build, or serialize the object-write+commit under the lock, or retry on the transient object/ref error).

citation.description: Test asserts 'assert not failures' (no writer failures) and 'assert _count_events(clone, tid, "-COMMENT.json") == n' (exactly n=16 events committed, no loss).

criteria.criterion: It still asserts no lost events under a concurrent writer storm.

citation.description: The reusable _build-and-test.yml (invoked by both test.yml and gerrit-verify.yaml) runs 'pytest -m integration' in a dedicated step. The test file sets pytestmark = pytest.mark.integration, so test_concurrent_writer_storm_no_loss is included in the integration tier run.

criteria.criterion: Regression coverage runs in the gerrit-verify Verified gate (integration tier).
